context: Evaluates use of crypto-browserify's createSign and createVerify APIs for digital signature creation and verification. The solution must correctly call update() and sign()/verify() methods with PEM keys.

checklist.name: Uses createSign
checklist.description: signMessage calls createSign(algorithm) from crypto-browserify to create a Sign object, passing the algorithm (e.g. 'SHA256').

checklist.name: Sign update and sign
checklist.description: signMessage calls sign.update(message) to feed the message, then sign.sign(privateKey) to produce the signature Buffer.

checklist.name: Uses createVerify
checklist.description: verifySignature calls createVerify(algorithm) from crypto-browserify to create a Verify object, passing the same algorithm.

checklist.name: Verify update and verify
checklist.description: verifySignature calls verify.update(message) to feed the message, then verify.verify(publicKey, signature) to check the signature, returning a boolean.

checklist.name: Returns boolean
checklist.description: verifySignature returns the boolean result from verify.verify() directly (true for valid, false for invalid).
